field.title: %Title% (Pk # %Form%) Filter
field.name: %prefix%_%name%_pk_%form%_filter
field.label: %Form%
field.options2:
{"query":"SELECT JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(c.titles, '$."$lang->getTag()"')) AS text, b.id AS value
FROM #__cck_core AS a
LEFT JOIN #__categories AS b ON b.id=a.pk
LEFT JOIN #__cck_store_item_categories AS c ON c.id=b.id
WHERE a.cck = "%prefix%_%prefix%_%form%" AND b.published=1 AND b.access IN ($user->getAuthorisedViewLevels())
ORDER BY text ASC","table":"#__content","name":"","where":"","value":"","orderby":"title","orderby_direction":"ASC","limit":"","language_detection":"joomla","language_codes":"EN,GB,US,FR","language_default":"EN","attr1":"","attr2":"","attr3":"","attr4":"","attr5":"","attr6":""}
